attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, 
CAST(COALESCE(CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)),CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS VARCHAR(19))) AS TIMESTAMP(0))
 AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
'-1' AS LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(CREATION_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATION_DATE, 
'-1' AS CREATED_BY, 
'-1' AS LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
COALESCE(REQUEST_ID,0) AS REQUEST_ID,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
REVISION, 
COALESCE(ORGANIZATION_ID,1) AS ORGANIZATION_ID, 
SUBINVENTORY_CODE, 
COALESCE(LOCATOR_ID,0) AS LOCATOR_ID, 
TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID, 
TRANSACTION_ACTION_ID, 
TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, 
COALESCE(TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID,0) AS TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID,
TRANSACTION_SOURCE_NAME, 
TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, 
TRANSACTION_UOM, 
PRIMARY_QUANTITY, 
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(TRANSACTION_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS TRANSACTION_DATE, 
COALESCE(VARIANCE_AMOUNT,0) AS VARIANCE_AMOUNT, 
COALESCE(ACCT_PERIOD_ID,0) AS ACCT_PERIOD_ID,
TRANSACTION_REFERENCE, 
COALESCE(REASON_ID,0) AS REASON_ID, 
COALESCE(DISTRIBUTION_ACCOUNT_ID,0) AS DISTRIBUTION_ACCOUNT_ID, 
COALESCE(ENCUMBRANCE_ACCOUNT,0) AS ENCUMBRANCE_ACCOUNT, 
COALESCE(ENCUMBRANCE_AMOUNT,0) AS ENCUMBRANCE_AMOUNT, 
COALESCE(COST_UPDATE_ID,0) AS COST_UPDATE_ID, 
COSTED_FLAG, 
COALESCE(TRANSACTION_GROUP_ID,0) AS TRANSACTION_GROUP_ID,
INVOICED_FLAG, 
COALESCE(ACTUAL_COST,0) AS ACTUAL_COST,
COALESCE(TRANSACTION_COST,0) AS TRANSACTION_COST,
COALESCE(PRIOR_COST,0) AS PRIOR_COST,
COALESCE(NEW_COST,0) AS NEW_COST,
CURRENCY_CODE, 
COALESCE(CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,0) AS CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, 
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, 
USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, 
COALESCE(QUANTITY_ADJUSTED,0) AS QUANTITY_ADJUSTED, 
EMPLOYEE_CODE, 
COALESCE(DEPARTMENT_ID,0) AS DEPARTMENT_ID, 
COALESCE(OPERATION_SEQ_NUM,0) AS OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, 
MASTER_SCHEDULE_UPDATE_CODE, 
RECEIVING_DOCUMENT, 
COALESCE(PICKING_LINE_ID,0) AS PICKING_LINE_ID, 
COALESCE(TRX_SOURCE_LINE_ID,0) AS TRX_SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
COALESCE(TRX_SOURCE_DELIVERY_ID,0) AS TRX_SOURCE_DELIVERY_ID, 
COALESCE(REPETITIVE_LINE_ID,0) AS REPETITIVE_LINE_ID, 
COALESCE(PHYSICAL_ADJUSTMENT_ID,0) AS PHYSICAL_ADJUSTMENT_ID, 
COALESCE(CYCLE_COUNT_ID,0) AS CYCLE_COUNT_ID, 
COALESCE(RMA_LINE_ID,0) AS RMA_LINE_ID, 
COALESCE(TRANSFER_TRANSACTION_ID,0) AS TRANSFER_TRANSACTION_ID,
COALESCE(TRANSACTION_SET_ID,0) AS TRANSACTION_SET_ID,
COALESCE(RCV_TRANSACTION_ID,0) AS RCV_TRANSACTION_ID, 
COALESCE(MOVE_TRANSACTION_ID,0) AS MOVE_TRANSACTION_ID, 
COALESCE(COMPLETION_TRANSACTION_ID,0) AS COMPLETION_TRANSACTION_ID, 
SHORTAGE_PROCESS_CODE, 
SOURCE_CODE, 
COALESCE(SOURCE_LINE_ID,0) AS SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
VENDOR_LOT_NUMBER, 
COALESCE(TRANSFER_ORGANIZATION_ID,0) AS TRANSFER_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
TRANSFER_SUBINVENTORY, 
COALESCE(TRANSFER_LOCATOR_ID,0) AS TRANSFER_LOCATOR_ID, 
COALESCE(SHIPMENT_NUMBER,0) AS SHIPMENT_NUMBER,
COALESCE(TRANSFER_COST,0) AS TRANSFER_COST, 
COALESCE(TRANSPORTATION_DIST_ACCOUNT,0) AS TRANSPORTATION_DIST_ACCOUNT,
COALESCE(TRANSPORTATION_COST,0) AS TRANSPORTATION_COST, 
COALESCE(TRANSFER_COST_DIST_ACCOUNT,0) AS TRANSFER_COST_DIST_ACCOUNT, 
COALESCE(WAYBILL_AIRBILL,0) AS WAYBILL_AIRBILL,
COALESCE(FREIGHT_CODE,0) AS FREIGHT_CODE, 
COALESCE(NUMBER_OF_CONTAINERS,0) AS NUMBER_OF_CONTAINERS,
COALESCE(VALUE_CHANGE,0) AS VALUE_CHANGE, 
COALESCE(PERCENTAGE_CHANGE,0) AS PERCENTAGE_CHANGE, 
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
ATTRIBUTE1, 
ATTRIBUTE2, 
ATTRIBUTE3, 
ATTRIBUTE4, 
ATTRIBUTE5, 
ATTRIBUTE6, 
ATTRIBUTE7, 
ATTRIBUTE8, 
ATTRIBUTE9, 
ATTRIBUTE10, 
ATTRIBUTE11, 
ATTRIBUTE12, 
ATTRIBUTE13, 
ATTRIBUTE14, 
ATTRIBUTE15, 
COALESCE(MOVEMENT_ID,0) AS  MOVEMENT_ID,
COALESCE(TASK_ID,0) AS TASK_ID,
COALESCE(TO_TASK_ID,0) AS TO_TASK_ID,
COALESCE(PROJECT_ID,0) AS PROJECT_ID, 
COALESCE(TO_PROJECT_ID,0) AS TO_PROJECT_ID, 
ERROR_CODE, 
ERROR_EXPLANATION, 
COALESCE(PRIOR_COSTED_QUANTITY,0) AS PRIOR_COSTED_QUANTITY,
COALESCE(TRANSFER_PRIOR_COSTED_QUANTITY,0) AS TRANSFER_PRIOR_COSTED_QUANTITY, 
FINAL_COMPLETION_FLAG, 
PM_COST_COLLECTED, 
COALESCE(PM_COST_COLLECTOR_GROUP_ID,0) AS PM_COST_COLLECTOR_GROUP_ID, 
SHIPMENT_COSTED, 
COALESCE(TRANSFER_PERCENTAGE,0) AS TRANSFER_PERCENTAGE, 
COALESCE(MATERIAL_ACCOUNT,0) AS MATERIAL_ACCOUNT, 
COALESCE(MATERIAL_OVERHEAD_ACCOUNT,0) AS MATERIAL_OVERHEAD_ACCOUNT, 
COALESCE(RESOURCE_ACCOUNT,0) AS RESOURCE_ACCOUNT, 
COALESCE(OUTSIDE_PROCESSING_ACCOUNT,0) AS OUTSIDE_PROCESSING_ACCOUNT, 
COALESCE(OVERHEAD_ACCOUNT,0) AS OVERHEAD_ACCOUNT,
COALESCE(COST_GROUP_ID,0) AS COST_GROUP_ID, 
COALESCE(TRANSFER_COST_GROUP_ID,0) AS TRANSFER_COST_GROUP_ID, 
FLOW_SCHEDULE, 
COALESCE(QA_COLLECTION_ID,0) AS QA_COLLECTION_ID, 
COALESCE(OVERCOMPLETION_TRANSACTION_QTY,0) AS OVERCOMPLETION_TRANSACTION_QTY, 
COALESCE(OVERCOMPLETION_PRIMARY_QTY,0) AS OVERCOMPLETION_PRIMARY_QTY, 
COALESCE(OVERCOMPLETION_TRANSACTION_ID,0) AS OVERCOMPLETION_TRANSACTION_ID, 
MVT_STAT_STATUS, 
COALESCE(COMMON_BOM_SEQ_ID,0) AS COMMON_BOM_SEQ_ID, 
COALESCE(COMMON_ROUTING_SEQ_ID,0) AS COMMON_ROUTING_SEQ_ID,
COALESCE(ORG_COST_GROUP_ID,0) AS ORG_COST_GROUP_ID,
COALESCE(COST_TYPE_ID,0) AS COST_TYPE_ID,
COALESCE(PERIODIC_PRIMARY_QUANTITY,0) AS PERIODIC_PRIMARY_QUANTITY, 
COALESCE(MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID,0) AS MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
COALESCE(TASK_GROUP_ID,0) AS TASK_GROUP_ID,
COALESCE(PICK_SLIP_NUMBER,0) AS PICK_SLIP_NUMBER, 
COALESCE(LPN_ID,0) AS LPN_ID, 
COALESCE(TRANSFER_LPN_ID,0) AS TRANSFER_LPN_ID, 
COALESCE(PICK_STRATEGY_ID,0) AS PICK_STRATEGY_ID, 
COALESCE(PICK_RULE_ID,0) AS PICK_RULE_ID, 
COALESCE(PUT_AWAY_STRATEGY_ID,0) AS PUT_AWAY_STRATEGY_ID,
COALESCE(PUT_AWAY_RULE_ID,0) AS PUT_AWAY_RULE_ID, 
COALESCE(CONTENT_LPN_ID,0) AS CONTENT_LPN_ID, 
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(PICK_SLIP_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS PICK_SLIP_DATE, 
COALESCE(COST_CATEGORY_ID,0) AS COST_CATEGORY_ID, 
ORGANIZATION_TYPE, 
TRANSFER_ORGANIZATION_TYPE, 
COALESCE(OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, 0) AS OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID,
COALESCE(OWNING_TP_TYPE,0) AS OWNING_TP_TYPE,
XFR_OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
TRANSFER_OWNING_TP_TYPE, 
PLANNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
PLANNING_TP_TYPE, 
XFR_PLANNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
TRANSFER_PLANNING_TP_TYPE, 
SECONDARY_UOM_CODE, 
COALESCE(SECONDARY_TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,0) AS  SECONDARY_TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
COALESCE(SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID,0) AS SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID,
COALESCE(RESERVATION_ID,0) AS RESERVATION_ID, 
COALESCE(TRANSACTION_MODE,0) AS TRANSACTION_MODE, 
COALESCE(TRANSACTION_BATCH_ID,0) AS TRANSACTION_BATCH_ID, 
COALESCE(TRANSACTION_BATCH_SEQ,0) AS TRANSACTION_BATCH_SEQ, 
COALESCE(INTRANSIT_ACCOUNT,0) AS INTRANSIT_ACCOUNT,
COALESCE(FOB_POINT,0) AS FOB_POINT,
COALESCE(PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,0) AS PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,
COALESCE(LOGICAL_TRX_TYPE_CODE,0) AS LOGICAL_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
COALESCE(TRX_FLOW_HEADER_ID,0) AS TRX_FLOW_HEADER_ID,
COALESCE(LOGICAL_TRANSACTIONS_CREATED,0) AS LOGICAL_TRANSACTIONS_CREATED,
COALESCE(LOGICAL_TRANSACTION,0) AS LOGICAL_TRANSACTION,
COALESCE(INTERCOMPANY_COST,0) AS INTERCOMPANY_COST, 
COALESCE(INTERCOMPANY_PRICING_OPTION,0) AS INTERCOMPANY_PRICING_OPTION,
INTERCOMPANY_CURRENCY_CODE, 
ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_TEMP_ID, 
COALESCE(TRANSFER_PRICE,0) AS TRANSFER_PRICE,
COALESCE(EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_ID,0) AS EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_ID,
COALESCE(COGS_RECOGNITION_PERCENT,0) AS COGS_RECOGNITION_PERCENT,
COALESCE(SO_ISSUE_ACCOUNT_TYPE,0) AS SO_ISSUE_ACCOUNT_TYPE, 
OPM_COSTED_FLAG, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS REFRESH_DATETIME, 
SOURCE_LINE_NUMBER, 
FLINE_NUMBER, 
COALESCE(FLINE_ID,0) AS FLINE_ID,
OFFSET_NUMBER, 
PARTITION_NUMBER, 
RECORD_COUNT 
FROM 
$$STGDB.PST_CLOUD_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT
